name: collab-docs-sync
description: Pull/push Markdown with the Collab-Docs web API (same backend as the browser client).

commands.title: Collab Docs: Pull document from server
Collab Docs: Push active file to server

collabDocs.apiBase.description: Base URL of the Collab-Docs API (no trailing slash).

collabDocs.documentId.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the document to sync.
